This crucial connection highlights the vital role played by a limited circle of Chinese bankers in supporting criminals within the crypto space.
news.headline: Chinese underground bankers are aiding crypto crime worldwide, linking criminals from North Korea and Mexican cartels, per TRM research.

news.summary: A recent national survey conducted in College Park, Maryland on April 17, 2025, has shown strong bipartisan support for maintaining current federal laws and regulations aimed at reducing air pollution and greenhouse gases, as well as opposition to expanding offshore drilling. The survey revealed that significant majorities across party lines back the retention of tax credits. This indicates a widespread consensus on environmental policies, with numbers showing a unified front in favor of preserving measures to combat climate change.
news.headline: Bipartisan support for clean energy tax credits, limits on offshore drilling; UMD survey shows.

news.summary: Atlanta, GA - April 17, 2025 - Gray Media has appointed Dana Neves as the new Senior Managing Vice President. Dana will now be in charge of multiple Gray television markets in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic regions. Previously serving for 7 years as the General Manager of Gray’s WFSB (CBS) in Hartford, Connecticut, Dana also successfully led the launch of the Connecticut-focused broadcast sports network, The Wax, last year. Gray Media will commence the search for Dana’s replacement promptly.
news.headline: Dana Neves promoted to Senior Managing Vice President at Gray Media. Oversees TV markets in Northeast and Mid-Atlantic. Past 7 years in WFSB (CBS). Gray searching for successor.

news.summary: In Worcester, Massachusetts, on April 17, 2025, The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: THG) announced it would conduct its annual shareholder meeting on May 13, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, at its headquarters situated at 440 Lincoln Street. The meeting will feature a live, audio-only webcast for all stakeholders to participate.
news.headline: NYSE: THG to hold annual meeting at 440 Lincoln Street in Worcester, Massachusetts on May 13, 2025, 9:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Miami Beach, Florida, a significant development is on the horizon as the Donatella Boutique Hotel and Restaurant is set to welcome guests starting in May 2025. Serving as the sister property to the renowned Versace Mansion, now known as 'The Villa Casa Casuarina,' this establishment marks a new milestone in Miami Beach's vibrant legacy.
news.headline: New luxury Donatella Boutique Hotel & Restaurant set to open in Miami Beach in May 2025, sister property to Versace Mansion.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 17, 2025, an inventor from Augusta, Georgia shared his inspiration to develop a novel kitchen appliance. The appliance is designed to efficiently transform tough vegetables and roots into dough suitable for preparing a variety of Latin American dishes. The inventor aimed to offer individuals a convenient and speedy solution for this task. The appliance is anticipated to greatly assist in simplifying the cooking process, bringing ease to the kitchens of many.
news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Augusta, Ga., develops CSK-723 appliance for processing hard vegetables into dough for Latin dishes.

news.summary: Goodfire, a prominent AI interpretability research company based in San Francisco, has received a significant boost in its mission to decode the neurons of AI models with a $50 million investment from Menlo Ventures in their Series A funding round. This funding will support Goodfire in reshaping how AI models are understood and designed. The investment marks a strong show of support for the company's innovative approach to enhancing the interpretability of AI technology.
news.headline: Goodfire secures $50M Series A funding from Menlo Ventures for AI interpretability research, reshaping AI understanding.

news.summary: Kevin M. Snyder has recently been named as a business representative on the Massachusetts Workers' Compensation Advisory Council (WCAC) for a term of five years. Mr. Snyder, who serves as the Director of Sales & Marketing at A.I.M. Mutual, will be contributing his expertise to the council. This significant appointment was announced on April 17, 2025 in Boston.
news.headline: Kevin Snyder appointed to MA WCAC for a five-year term as business representative by Governor.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 5.2%, which is a significant increase from the previous month. The number of jobless individuals has risen by 150,000, indicating a concerning trend in the labor market. Economists are attributing this surge in unemployment to various factors such as the ongoing pandemic, supply chain disruptions, and a slowdown in consumer spending. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was revised down to 2.1%, reflecting a slight downturn in economic activity. Despite government efforts to stimulate the economy, the job market remains fragile, prompting calls for further interventions to support businesses and workers during these challenging times.
news.headline: Day traders cling to leveraged funds despite risks, showing resilience and devotion. #daytraders #leveragedfunds #resilience
Trump touts gasoline price declines.

news.summary: A recent study revealed troubling statistics regarding smoking habits among teenagers in the US. The data showed that approximately 1 in 10 high school students reported using cigarettes in the past month, with an alarming 3 out of 10 students trying electronic cigarettes. Furthermore, the study found that nearly 1 in 4 students had tried a hookah, and about 1 in 14 had experimented with smokeless tobacco. These numbers highlight the concerning prevalence of tobacco use among young people, emphasizing the need for targeted prevention efforts and education on the risks associated with smoking.
news.headline: 2025 HBR Leadership Summit hosted by Harvard Business Review set for April 29.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Rocket Lab to get in touch with him. If you bought or obtained securities in Rocket Lab from November 12, 2024, to February 25, 2025, and faced losses, you are advised to contact him to explore your options.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims on behalf of Rocket Lab investors. Contact James Wilson if you suffered losses. Buy/ acquire between Nov 12, 2024-Feb 25, 2025.

news.summary: The global typhoid fever vaccines market was valued at $351.4 million in 2022 and is projected to reach $884.8 million by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.2%. Capsular polysaccharide vaccines are expected to dominate the market, accounting for 54.8% of the global market share in 2022. Africa leads in typhoid fever vaccine demand, representing 18.8% of the market in 2022, while Asia Pacific is expected to see significant growth due to rising typhoid incidence and government immunization initiatives. North America holds the second-largest market share. The World Health Organization reports around 9 million people are affected by typhoid fever annually, with approximately 110,000 deaths. The increasing prevalence of typhoid fever globally is driving market growth as awareness of the risks associated with the disease grows. This trend is expected to continue in the future.
news.headline: Global typhoid fever vaccines market to reach $884.8 million by 2030 with a 12.2% CAGR, driven by increasing prevalence of typhoid globally.

news.summary: In March, a total of 11,000 households signed up for HomeBinder, showcasing rapid acceptance just over a year since its introduction. On April 17, 2025, in Tyrone, Pa., InspectionGo (iGo), a renowned technology and services provider for the home inspection sector, revealed this noteworthy achievement.

news.summary: In a recent press release on April 17, 2025, DSMA revealed an exclusive corporate retreat collaboration with Hope of Life, a well-known humanitarian group. The innovative program, known as "Meetings on Mission", integrates leadership training, team-building exercises, and philanthropic initiatives. This distinct corporate retreat aims to provide a transformative experience for participants while also supporting Hope of Life's global efforts.
news.headline: DSMA partners with Hope of Life for a unique corporate retreat experience named "Meetings on Mission" in 2025.

news.summary: In an exciting development on April 17, 2025, Thrive Dental & Orthodontics unveiled their latest cutting-edge facility in North Dallas on Forest Lane. The grand opening of this state-of-the-art branch underscores the company's dedication to offering exceptional dental services to a wider audience.
news.headline: Thrive Dental & Orthodontics opens new location in North Dallas on Forest Lane. Expands services to more customers.

news.summary: An esteemed winery from Tuscany is venturing into the Etna region, known for its rapidly rising prominence in the Italian wine scene. This move comes as Lamberto Frescobaldi and Marco de Grazia, close friends with a strong love for wine, aim to explore new opportunities. Expanding into Etna, recognized as one of Italy's top wine destinations, signifies a bold step for the winery. The decision showcases a commitment to growth and innovation in the industry. This development marks an exciting new chapter for the winery, tapping into the thriving potential of Etna, one of the most dynamic areas for wine production in Italy.
news.headline: Frescobaldi and Tenuta delle Terre Nere form alliance. Tuscan winery expands into Etna, Italy's 'hottest' wine region.

news.summary: In Buffalo-Niagara, New York, on April 17, 2025, it was reported that the H5N1 avian influenza virus is rapidly spreading among various species and regions. Fortunately, a vaccine created by POP Biotechnologies, a spin-off company from the University of Buffalo (SUNY), has shown promising results in preclinical tests. The vaccine has displayed full protection against the virus, marking a significant advancement in combating the disease. This development comes at a crucial time as the global cases of H5N1 continue to increase, emphasizing the urgent need for effective preventive measures.
news.headline: Magnet-like nanoparticle vaccine by POP Biotechnologies achieves 100% protection against H5N1 in preclinical trials.

news.summary: A trade dispute between the Trump administration and the Chinese government has resulted in escalating tensions, affecting numerous U.S. businesses. As a result, the situation has reached a standoff, with no resolution in sight. The conflict has put a strain on trade relations between the two countries, impacting industries across various sectors. With billions of dollars at stake, the standoff has caused uncertainty and concern among American companies operating in China.
news.headline: US-China trade tension escalates as Trump admin faces off with Chinese govt, putting American businesses at risk.

news.summary: By midday on Tuesday, Wall Street experienced gains as investor worries about the economic effects of trade tensions eased. This was due to a more conciliatory stance taken by the Trump administration. All major indexes showed positive movement, with tech stocks such as Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) and Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) leading the way with a 6% increase each. Netflix surged after reports from The Wall Street Journal suggested a plan to double revenue by 2030. The company is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday. The S&P 500 has now recovered almost 80% of the losses seen following Trump's tariff announcement on April 2. Financial sectors saw the most significant gains at 1.3%. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stocks rise on strong bank earnings, Netflix and Palantir both up 6%. S&P 500 recovers 80% of losses, tech stocks lead. Financial sector gains 1.3%.

news.summary: A recent social media post by President Trump led to an uncommon reaction from the stock market. Finance reporter Rob Copeland from The New York Times discusses whether this action could be seen as market manipulation by the president. The post resulted in a significant rise of 2% in stock prices, with the S&P 500 index increasing by 50 points. This event has sparked discussions among experts regarding the potential influence of political figures on financial markets.
news.headline: Trump’s social media post led to a surprising stock market reaction. Was this market manipulation by the president? Rob Copeland on the case.

news.summary: A strategic partnership has been unveiled between Asembia, a prominent player in specialty pharmaceutical services based in Florham Park, New Jersey, and Outcomes, a leading clinical engagement platform as of April 17, 2025. This collaboration aims to leverage the respective expertise of the two firms to bolster prescription assistance and advance the overall quality of services. The partnership is anticipated to significantly impact the pharmaceutical sector, benefiting a wide range of stakeholders involved.
news.headline: Asembia and Outcomes partner to bolster pharmacy support, enhance patient engagement. Effort aims to improve prescription support.

news.summary: In New York, on April 17, 2025, AI Transportation Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: AITR) disclosed that The Nasdaq Stock Market, LLC ("Nasdaq") decided to halt trading and delist AITR's securities from Nasdaq. This action was taken due to AITR's non-payment of specific fees mandated by Listing Rule 5250(f). AITR has the option to appeal this decision; however, it has chosen not to request a hearing to challenge the determination. The choice was made following a thorough assessment of various factors, which considered the potential to reduce the high costs linked with maintaining a Nasdaq listing and adhering to Nasdaq's listing requirements.
news.headline: AI Transportation Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: AITR) to delist from Nasdaq due to unpaid fees and expected SEC deregistration.

news.summary: San Francisco-based SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) has revealed a substantial development in its Loan Platform Business agreement for personal loans. The company announced an extension of $2 billion in funds managed by Fortress Investment Group affiliates. This extension comes after the initial $2 billion agreement made public in October 2024. Additionally, SoFi has entered a new two-year agreement to facilitate an extra $1.2 billion in loan origination. The technology used for this venture will be fueled by a collaborative effort with a joint venture.
news.headline: SoFi expands loan platform with $3.2B agreement with Fortress, Edge Focus - significant funding boost.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 17, 2025, an inventor from Batesburg-Leesville, S.C., shared his inspiration behind the creation of BED FRAME COVERS. The inventor stated his goal was to produce an ornamental cover for headboards. He believed that his innovative design would not only improve the overall look of the bed but also attract more interest. This invention aims to bring style and decor to bed frames, potentially revolutionizing the way people approach bed aesthetics.
news.headline: Inventor from S.C. develops BED FRAME COVERS for headboards to enhance appearance, aims to spark attention.

If you bought or acquired Ready Capital securities within the period of November 7, 2024, to March 2, 2025, and faced losses, Wilson advises contacting him directly to explore available avenues.
